prerequisites: A Mention account with API access.
An application registered in the Mention developer portal (https://dev.mention.com/) to obtain an access token.
A stats_start_date value to define the beginning of the statistics retrieval window (required).

authMethods.name: API key (bearer access token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the api_key secret field, which holds a Mention bearer access token. Create an application in the Mention developer portal and copy the access token from the app's details page. The Mention API accepts the token as a Bearer value in the Authorization header or as an access_token query string parameter. Keep the token confidential, as it grants full access to your account.

setupSteps.title: Create a Mention developer app
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Mention account and register an application at the Mention developer portal (https://dev.mention.com/). Open the app's details page to retrieve its access token. This token is the value the connector expects in the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Provide the access token as api_key
setupSteps.body: Enter the access token from your Mention app into the connector's required api_key field. Treat it as a secret, since it provides full access to your Mention account. The connector uses it as a bearer token against the Mention API at https://api.mention.net/api.

setupSteps.title: Set the statistics date range
setupSteps.body: Set stats_start_date (required) to the start of the statistics window. Optionally set stats_end_date to bound the end of the window. If omitted, only the start date constrains the range.

setupSteps.title: Choose the statistics interval
setupSteps.body: Optionally set stats_interval to control the periodicity of returned statistics. Accepted values are daily (P1D), weekly (P1W), or monthly (P1M); the default is daily (P1D).

sources.title: Mention API Reference - Overview and Authentication
